chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 147 of 2020 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at Flag-A 2. For hearing of main case 05.12.2023 Mr. Achar Khan Gabol, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned AAG has already filed a statement that petitioner has been appointed on the basis of deceased quota, and therefore, her grievance has been redressed. Counsel for the petitioner is satisfied, and the petition is accordingly disposed of. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
